entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the crop studied for grain mould resistance

entities.name: GRAIN MOULD
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting the grains of pearl millet

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental period during which mould reaction was evaluated

entities.name: THRESHED GRAIN MOULD RATING
entities.description: A rating system (TGMS) used to evaluate mould on threshed grains

entities.name: MYCOFLORA
entities.description: The fungal community associated with the pearl millet grains

entities.name: FIELD EVALUATION
entities.description: Assessment of mould scores conducted in the field

entities.name: IN VITRO EVALUATION
entities.description: Assessment of mould scores conducted in a laboratory setting

entities.name: FUSARIUM MONILIFORME
entities.description: A fungus identified as a major cause of grain mould in pearl millet

entities.name: FUSARIUM PALLIDOROSEUM
entities.description: A fungus identified as a major cause of grain mould in pearl millet

entities.name: CURVULARIA PENNISETTI
entities.description: A fungus identified as a major cause of grain mould in pearl millet

entities.name: HELMINTHOSPORIUM SPP.
entities.description: Fungi identified as affecting pearl millet grain

entities.name: ALTERNARIA SPP.
entities.description: Fungi identified as affecting pearl millet grain

entities.name: COLLETOTRICHUM SPP.
entities.description: Fungi identified as affecting pearl millet grain

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL MATURITY
entities.description: The plant development stage recommended for harvesting to ensure grain quality

entities.name: SEED GERMINATION
entities.description: The percentage of seeds that germinate, which is negatively correlated with TGMS

entities.name: UNGERMINATED SEEDS
entities.description: The percentage of seeds that do not germinate, which is positively correlated with TGMS

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet accessions to resist grain mould

entities.name: BLOTTER TEST
entities.description: A laboratory test used to reveal the mycoflora of grains
